title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TechSaksham South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TechSaksham South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham South Asia Partners family as a Curriculum Developer in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham South Asia Partners:
TechSaksham South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham South Asia Partners!
